prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6711→7411→6922→6074→4716，2023年起位次持续前移（数字减小），近3年累计前移约2200名；2025年基准约4716名，呈明显上升 趋势；本省物理类计划2021年73人、2022年73人、2023年65人、2024年76人、2025年94人，逐年扩招；2026年计划大幅缩减至52人，较2025年减少约44.7 %，缩招幅度显著，竞争将明显加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；哈工大本部软科主榜2026年约第12名，近年排名稳定在前15，属顶尖工科院校；威海校区共享哈 工大品牌与学科资源；哈工大2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第10（高热），短视频平台关注度极高，反映报考关注持续升温；哈工大拥有17个A-及以上学科，其中力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程为A+，计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、电气工程等均为A，学科实力 顶尖；威海校区招生专业覆盖计算机、人工智能、自动化、机器人等热门方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业以工科试验班（未来信息、未来智造卓越优才计划）和软 件工程为主，均为当前社会高热专业方向；本省物理类考生从2025年约32万人增至2026年约34.7万人（+8.4%），竞争基数扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4716名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减44.7%（缩招推高竞争烈度，位次前移）、本省物理类考生增加8.4%（进一步加剧竞争）、抖音高热反映关注度上升等多 重因素，2026年最低位次预计较2025年显著前移；预测最低位次约3422名，区间3011–3833名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（含计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全等）
- 工科试验班（未来智造卓越优才计划）（含机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 软件工程（卓越优才计划）
- 工科试验班（理工交叉卓越优才计划）（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类预测位次约3422名，区间3011–3833名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺；位次明显优于区间上限（<3011名）可重点冲刺一档未来信息/未来智造专业；位 次接近区间下限（3833名附近）建议以二档卓越优才计划为主。由于该校2026年大幅缩招且专业均为热门工科方向，竞争将非常激烈，建议合理评估自身位次后谨慎填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6711 → 7411 → 6922 → 6074 → 4716. Since 2023, the ranking has been moving forward (decreasing numbers), with a cumulative forward movement of about 2200 positions in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 4716, showing a clear upward trend. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 73 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 65 in 2023, 76 in 2024, and 94 in 2025, with year-on-year expansion. In 2026, the plan is drastically reduced to 52, a decrease of about 44.7% compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Harbin Institute of Technology's main campus ranks approximately 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, with a stable position in the top 15 in recent years, making it a top-tier engineering institution. The Weihai campus shares the HIT brand and disciplinary resources. HIT's 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. It ranks 10th in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), reflecting extremely high attention on short video platforms and indicating rising application interest. HIT has 17 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, and Materials Science and Engineering, and A in Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Electrical Engineering, demonstrating top-tier disciplinary strength. The Weihai campus offers majors in popular fields such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, and Robotics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 enrollment majors are mainly Engineering Experimental Classes (Future Information, Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program) and Software Engineering, all of which are currently high-demand majors in society. The number of provincial Physics Category examinees increased from approximately 320,000 in 2025 to approximately 347,000 in 2026 (+8.4%), expanding the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4716, the 2026 enrollment plan's drastic reduction of 44.7% (which will push rankings forward due to intensified competition), the 8.4% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees (further intensifying competition), and the high Douyin popularity reflecting rising attention, the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to move significantly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3422, with a range of 3011–3833.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Network Space Security, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program) (including Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design and Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Software Engineering (Excellent Talent Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science-Engineering Intersection Excellent Talent Program) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- None currently
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 3422, with a range of 3011–3833. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 with Tier 1 as a reach. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<3011), prioritize Tier 1 Future Information/Future Intelligent Manufacturing majors. For rankings near the lower limit (around 3833), focus on Tier 2 Excellent Talent Programs. Due to the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 and all majors being popular engineering directions, competition will be very intense. It is recommended to carefully evaluate your own ranking before filling in the application.
